goal: Split ResponseAPI into an explicit official beta surface and a clearly deferred experimental surface without removing existing implementation.
successCriteria: Users can distinguish official beta helpers from deferred experimental helpers at the import and docs layer without behavior ambiguity.
The stable versus deferred ResponseAPI surface is reflected consistently across exports, docs, and capability truth.
Focused verification covers ResponseAPI surface routing without breaking existing supported helpers.
touchedSurfaces: cloud-surface docs and capability truth for official versus deferred helpers
ResponseAPI-focused tests and package-level review artifacts
explicitlyOutOfScope: Promoting additional ResponseAPI helpers beyond the tracked official beta subset
Changing runtime session or MCP host behavior outside ResponseAPI call paths
integrationPrerequisites: Wave B foundation/export-coverage-guard is integrated on codex/vnext-integration as 23e8fb9.
Public contract changes must stay aligned with current capability truth and docs wording.

liveVerifyStatus.reason: This package clarifies public surface boundaries and export paths; it does not require live credentials unless a new GA/Beta runtime behavior is introduced.
